productName: Green Reaper - Diamond Sauce - Purple Cat Piss - 1g
description: Aromatic hybrid live resin pressed from fresh-frozen Purple Cat Piss, the sweet spot of flavor, potency, and that 'just-harvested' terpene rush. Full-spectrum and bursting with terps, a sweet grape-and-berry aroma with a relaxing, mellow feel, delivering an even, best-of-both-worlds feel.
